mapper.insert: INSERT INTO public_share_snapshots ( share_id, inspection_id, title, verification_status, verification_display_text, public_address_summary, public_landmark_hint, deposit_amount, monthly_rent_amount, premium_amount ) VALUES ( #{shareId}, #{inspectionId}, #{title}, #{verificationStatus}, #{verificationDisplayText}, #{publicAddressSummary}, #{publicLandmarkHint}, #{depositAmount}, #{monthlyRentAmount}, #{premiumAmount} )
INSERT INTO public_share_snapshot_facilities ( share_id, display_order, label, answer ) VALUES ( #{shareId}, #{displayOrder}, #{label}, #{answer} )
INSERT INTO public_share_snapshot_images ( share_id, display_order, content_type, source_storage_key ) VALUES ( #{shareId}, #{displayOrder}, #{contentType}, #{sourceStorageKey} )
mapper.select: SELECT share_id, title, verification_status, verification_display_text, public_address_summary, public_landmark_hint, deposit_amount, monthly_rent_amount, premium_amount FROM public_share_snapshots WHERE share_id = #{shareId}
SELECT share_id, display_order, label, answer FROM public_share_snapshot_facilities WHERE share_id = #{shareId} ORDER BY display_order
SELECT share_id, display_order, content_type, source_storage_key FROM public_share_snapshot_images WHERE share_id = #{shareId} ORDER BY display_order
SELECT share_id, display_order, content_type, source_storage_key FROM public_share_snapshot_images WHERE share_id = #{shareId} AND display_order = #{displayOrder}
